name: Shepherd's Pie (Joyce's)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and carrot, and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the ground beef to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
4. Drain off excess grease if necessary.
5. Stir in the flour, oatmeal, garlic, Worcestershire sauce, and pepper to taste.
6. Dissolve the bouillon cube in hot water, stirring until combined.
7. Add the dissolved bouillon mixture to the skillet with the beef filling.
8. Transfer the beef mixture to a baking dish.
9. Top with the whipped potatoes (mix equal parts mashed potatoes and all-purpose flour).
10. Sprinkle with paprika.
11. Bake at 325°F for 25-30 minutes, or until heated through and golden brown on top.
